steps.title: Identify the cost components
steps.content:
The technician charges for two things:
  • Labor: $60 per hour, so for $x$ hours the cost is $60x$ dollars
  • Parts: a flat fee of \$120 dollars

steps.title: Write the total cost function
steps.content: The total cost is the sum of the two components: $$f(x) = 60x + 120$$. This matches choice C — C is correct.
